message:
fix(tui): resolve clippy lints and implement breadcrumb/command palette rendering

- Add breadcrumb navigation trail showing screen history (max 5 entries)
- Implement command palette overlay with search, cursor, match counts
- Fix 17 clippy lints: option_if_let_else, map_unwrap_or, collapsible_if,
  branches_sharing_code, wildcard_for_single_variants, large_types_passed_by_value,
  write_literal, single_char_pattern, needless_collect, match_same_arms
- Update palette_overlay_shows_matching_actions test to use dynamic action count
- All 1762 lib tests and 33 bin tests pass, clippy clean on --lib

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
